starting with the 2017 and 2018 Release 2 RIFs
2 Fields are populated starting with the 2020 Release 1 RIF
3 Fields populated starting with the 2023 Release 1 RIF are designated as "New3"
4 Fields that are retired; therefore, blank starting with the 2023 Release 1 RIF are designated as "Retired4"
